prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约14309名→26826名→26587名→25049名→32607名。2022年位次大幅后移约12500名，此后三年在25000–33000名区间 波动，2025年基准约32607名，较2024年后移约7558名，波动幅度较大；该校在河南省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021年78人、2022年87人、2023年88人、202 4年88人、2025年130人；2026年计划173人，较2025年扩招43人（增幅约33%），扩招幅度显著，理论上可缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中师范大学为211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在46–58名区间，2026年升至第53名，排名稳中有升，属于全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于81岁 博士在华师毕业等正面事件；抖音热度排名第89位（评价一般），短视频曝光量中等；近年无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期较为平稳；教育学A+（全国 顶尖），中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，共5个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出，对有志于教育事业的考生吸引力较强。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次32607名、2026年扩招33%与物理类考生增约32%的供需对冲，以及声誉偏正面、排名微升的微弱吸引效应，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有前移；预测最低位次约3 8879名，区间38379–39379名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 14309 → 26826 → 26587 → 25049 → 32607. In 2022, the ranking significantly dropped by about 12500 places, and fluctuated within the 25000–33000 range over the next three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 32607, a decrease of about 7558 places compared to 2024, indicating considerable volatility. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Henan: 78 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 88 in 2024, 130 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 173, an increase of 43 students (approximately 33%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically could alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 46–58 range in recent years, rising to 53rd in 2026, showing a steady upward trend and placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate from CCNU. Douyin popularity ranking is 89th (average evaluation), with moderate short video exposure. There have been no records of admission cutoff line drops or crashes in recent years, and the psychological expectations for applications are relatively stable. Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, with a total of 5 A- or above disciplines. The strength of teacher-training disciplines is outstanding, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to careers in education.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Henan is about 732,000 (an increase of approximately 32% from 555,000 in 2025), with a significant growth in the candidate pool, expanding the competitive base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 32607, the 33% enrollment expansion in 2026 offset by the approximately 32% increase in Physics Category candidates, along with the slightly positive reputation and minor ranking improvement, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly improve compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 38879, with a range of 38379–39379.
